mapper.sql: id, name, category_id, subcategory_id, cover_image, price, stock, sales, description, status, is_recommend, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from ws_product where id = #{id} limit 1
select from ws_product order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into ws_product(name, category_id, subcategory_id, cover_image, price, stock, sales, description, status, is_recommend) values (#{name}, #{categoryId}, #{subcategoryId}, #{coverImage}, #{price}, #{stock}, ifnull(#{sales}, 0), #{description}, #{status}, #{isRecommend})
mapper.update: update ws_product set name = #{name}, category_id = #{categoryId}, subcategory_id = #{subcategoryId}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, price = #{price}, stock = #{stock}, sales = ifnull(#{sales}, sales), description = #{description}, status = #{status}, is_recommend = #{isRecommend} where id = #{id}
